node.Abs.description: Return the absolute value of a number.
node.Abs.name: Abs
node.Acos.description: Return the arccosine of a value in degrees; the input should be between -1 and 1.
node.Acos.name: Acos
node.AddCurrentEarnRP.description: Add to the RP earned during the current outing and return the new value.
node.AddCurrentEarnRP.name: Add Current Earn RP
node.AddCurrentRP.description: Add to the player's total held RP and return the new value.
node.AddCurrentRP.name: Add Current RP
node.AddEcstasy.description: Add or subtract from the player's ecstasy value and return the new value.
node.AddEcstasy.name: Add Ecstasy
node.AddItemCount.description: Add or subtract a specific item count and return the new count.
node.AddItemCount.name: Add Item Count
node.AddMoisture.description: Add or subtract from the player's bladder/moisture value and return the new value.
node.AddMoisture.name: Add Moisture
node.AddStamina.description: Add or subtract from the player's stamina value and return the new value.
node.AddStamina.name: Add Stamina
node.Asin.description: Return the arcsine of a value in degrees; the input should be between -1 and 1.
node.Asin.name: Asin
node.Atan.description: Return the arctangent of a value in degrees.
node.Atan.name: Atan
node.Boolean.description: Output a constant boolean value of true or false.
node.Boolean.name: Boolean
node.Break.description: Exit the current For or While loop early and continue with the code after the loop.
node.Break.name: Break
node.BreakVector.description: Split a vector into separate x, y and z components.
node.BreakVector.name: Break Vector
node.CallFunction.description: Call a function by name dynamically, passing either a list of arguments or an argument object.
node.CallFunction.name: Call Function
node.CallMethod.description: Call a method on a thread object dynamically, passing the thread reference and method name.
node.CallMethod.name: Call Method
node.CanGameOver.description: Set or get whether the game can end when an NPC spots the player.
node.CanGameOver.name: Can Game Over
node.Ceil.description: Round a number up to the nearest integer.
node.Ceil.name: Ceil
node.CheckCondition.description: Evaluate a condition object and return whether it is satisfied.
node.CheckCondition.name: Check Condition
node.CheckCosplay.description: Return whether the specified cosplay costume(s) are currently equipped.
node.CheckCosplay.name: Check Cosplay
node.CheckEquipment.description: Return whether the specified adult toy or equipment is currently equipped.
node.CheckEquipment.name: Check Equipment
node.CollectItem.description: Pick up a dropped item of the specified type, optionally choosing a specific instance by position.
node.CollectItem.name: Collect Item
node.Color.description: Create a color list [r, g, b, a] with each component in the 0–1 range for UI or visual effects.
node.Color.name: Color
node.Comment.description: Add a text-only note to the graph for documentation; it is not exported to .code.
node.Comment.name: Comment
node.CompareNumbers.description: Compare two numbers and return the result as a boolean.
node.CompareNumbers.name: Compare Numbers
node.Copy.description: Copy a List, with an option to perform a deep copy of nested contents.
node.Copy.name: Copy
node.Cos.description: Return the cosine of an angle in degrees.
node.Cos.name: Cos
node.CreateArea.description: Create an area in a stage for detecting player presence, as a sphere, cylinder or box.
node.CreateArea.name: Create Area
node.CreateAudio.description: Create an audio source for playing background music or sound effects.
node.CreateAudio.name: Create Audio
node.StopAudio.description: Stop an audio instance started by Audio.Play(), optionally fading it out.
node.StopAudio.name: Stop Audio
node.CreateCondition.description: Create a composite condition object using AND, OR, NOT and comparison operators.
node.CreateCondition.name: Create Condition
node.CreateGallery.description: Create a gallery UI for filtering and displaying snapshots.
node.CreateGallery.name: Create Gallery
node.CreateInput.description: Create an input detector for key presses, combinations or holds.
node.CreateInput.name: Create Input
node.CreateInteractArea.description: Create a spherical area where the player can choose an interaction option.
node.CreateInteractArea.name: Create Interact Area
node.CreateItemCondition.description: Create a condition object that checks whether a specific item exists in an area or zone.
node.CreateItemCondition.name: Create Item Condition
node.CreateList.description: Create a new List object, optionally populated with named or unnamed key-value pairs.
node.CreateList.name: Create List
node.CreateListFromJson.description: Load a JSON file and parse it into a List object.
node.CreateListFromJson.name: Create List From JSON
node.CreateEventListener.description: Create a parent-scope listener that runs once when the matching event is set.
node.CreateEventListener.name: Create Event Listener
node.CreateEventListenerLocal.descriptio: Create a current-scope listener that runs once when the matching event is set.
node.CreateEventListenerLocal.name: Create Event Listener Local
node.CreateListener.description: Create a listener that runs every frame in the parent scope.
node.CreateListener.name: Create Listener
node.CreateListenerLocal.description: Create a listener that runs every frame in the current scope and can access local variables.
node.CreateListenerLocal.name: Create Local Listener
node.CreateMessengerChat.description: Create a messenger chat UI that can show messages, buttons and replies.
node.CreateMessengerChat.name: Create Messenger Chat
node.CreateMessengerChat.param.title: title
node.CreateMissionMenuItem.description: Create a mission entry in the Tab menu mission list.
node.CreateMissionMenuItem.name: Create Mission Menu Item
node.CreateMissionPanel.description: Create a mission panel on the HUD for displaying title, RP and progress.
node.CreateMissionPanel.name: Create Mission Panel
node.CreateNPC.description: Create an NPC or connect to an existing one, with optional appearance, path and behavior.
node.CreateNPC.name: Create NPC
node.NPCWarp.description: Instantly change the position and rotation of an NPC.
node.NPCWarp.name: NPC Warp
node.NPCAddWaypoint.description: Add a waypoint to an NPC's path for sequential movement.
node.NPCAddWaypoint.name: NPC Add Waypoint
node.NPCIsAlive.description: Return whether an NPC object still exists.
node.NPCIsAlive.name: NPC Is Alive
node.NPCSeesPlayer.description: Return whether an NPC can currently see the player.
node.NPCSeesPlayer.name: NPC Sees Player
node.NPCSeesFlashing.description: Return whether an NPC sees the player flashing.
node.NPCSeesFlashing.name: NPC Sees Flashing
node.CreateSnapshot.description: Create a snapshot camera that can capture a scene screenshot.
node.CreateSnapshot.name: Create Snapshot
node.CreateText.description: Create a text display object for on-screen dialog, descriptions or prompts.
node.CreateText.name: Create Text
node.CreateThread.description: Create a new thread and run its entry label once; variables inside the thread are scoped to it.
node.CreateThread.name: Create Thread
node.CreateZone.description: Combine multiple areas into a zone for range checks or distance calculations.
node.CreateZone.name: Create Zone
node.DeactivateSex.description: Exit the current sex scene and return the player to normal gameplay.
node.DeactivateSex.name: Deactivate Sex
node.DeleteSnapshot.description: Mark a snapshot as deleted so it will be removed on the next game launch if unreferenced.
node.DeleteSnapshot.name: Delete Snapshot
node.DestroyListener.description: Destroy the current listener by setting its reference to null.
node.DestroyListener.name: Destroy Listener
node.DropItem.description: Drop an item of the given type at a position in the specified stage. The returned value identifies the dropped instance.
node.DropItem.name: Drop Item
node.DumpVariable.description: Print a single variable to the console, with an optional recursion depth for nested lists.
node.DumpVariable.name: Dump Variable
node.DumpVariables.description: Print all variables in the current and parent scopes to the console for debugging.
node.DumpVariables.name: Dump Variables
node.EquipAdultToy.description: Equip one or more adult toys on the player by name or list.
node.EquipAdultToy.name: Equip Adult Toy
node.EquipCosplay.description: Equip one or more cosplay costumes on the player by key or list.
node.EquipCosplay.name: Equip Cosplay
node.FileExists.description: Check whether a file exists at the given path relative to the project folder.
node.FileExists.name: File Exists
node.Find.description: Return the starting index of the first occurrence of a substring, or -1 if not found.
node.Find.name: Find
node.Floor.description: Round a number down to the nearest integer.
node.Floor.name: Floor
node.For.description: Iterate over each element of a list. The current element is available as the variable i inside the loop body.
node.For.name: For
node.ForeachNode.description: Iterate over a list and execute a target label for each element.
node.ForeachNode.name: Foreach Node
node.Format.description: Replace placeholders {0}, {1}, etc. in a template string with the supplied values.
node.Format.name: Format
node.GetAllSnapshots.description: Return a list of references to all snapshots, optionally including deleted or hidden ones.
node.GetAllSnapshots.name: Get All Snapshots
node.GetAllWaypoints.description: Return a list of all waypoints in the current stage.
node.GetAllWaypoints.name: Get All Waypoints
node.GetCurrentEarnRP.description: Return the RP earned so far during the current outing.
node.GetCurrentEarnRP.name: Get Current Earn RP
node.GetCurrentRP.description: Return the player's total held RP across all outings.
node.GetCurrentRP.name: Get Current RP
node.GetCurrentThread.description: Return a reference to the currently executing thread (_this).
node.GetCurrentThread.name: Get Current Thread
node.GetEcstasy.description: Return the player's current ecstasy value.
node.GetEcstasy.name: Get Ecstasy
node.GetEvent.description: Check whether the named event was set last frame and return its data as a list.
node.GetEvent.name: Get Event
node.GetEvent.param.name: name
node.GetFileExtension.description: Return the file extension from a path, including the dot.
node.GetFileExtension.name: Get File Extension
node.GetFiles.description: Return a list of files in a directory, optionally including subfolders.
node.GetFiles.name: Get Files
node.GetGraphicsOption.description: Return the current value of a graphics option.
node.GetGraphicsOption.name: Get Graphics Option
node.GetImageReference.description: Return an image reference from a file path relative to the project folder.
node.GetImageReference.name: Get Image Reference
node.GetItemCount.description: Return the number of a specific item currently held by the player.
node.GetItemCount.name: Get Item Count
node.GetLanguage.description: Return the current game language code, for example En, Ja, Ko, Sc or Tc.
node.GetLanguage.name: Get Language
node.FunctionExists.description: Check whether a function is defined by the engine or an extension before calling it.
node.FunctionExists.name: Function Exists
node.GetModVersion.description: Return the version of a mod as a list of major, minor and build numbers, or Custom Mission's version if no GUID is provided.
node.GetModVersion.name: Get Mod Version
node.Translate.description: Translate a localization key using the game's built-in localizer and optional format arguments.
node.Translate.name: Translate
node.ListInsert.description: Insert one or more values into a List at a given index, or append if no index is provided.
node.ListInsert.name: List Insert
node.ListRemove.description: Remove values from a List at a given index, or from the end if no index is provided.
node.ListRemove.name: List Remove
node.ListCount.description: Return the number of elements in a List.
node.ListCount.name: List Count
node.ListContains.description: Return whether a List contains the specified value.
node.ListContains.name: List Contains
node.ListIndexOf.description: Return the key of the first occurrence of a value in a List, or null if not found.
node.ListIndexOf.name: List IndexOf
node.ListKeys.description: Return a new List containing all keys of a List.
node.ListKeys.name: List Keys
node.GetMod.description: Read the project data shared to this mod (_mod).
node.GetMod.name: Get Mod
node.GetMods.description: Read data from all active mods, indexed by project folder name (_mods).
node.GetMods.name: Get Mods
node.GetProjectName.description: Read the current project folder name used in _mods (_name).
node.GetProjectName.name: Get Project Name
node.GetStageChanged.description: Read whether the player changed stage between the last frame and this frame (_stagechanged).
node.GetStageChanged.name: Get Stage Changed
node.GetMoisture.description: Return the player's current bladder/moisture value.
node.GetMoisture.name: Get Moisture
node.TriggerSexOrgasm.description: Trigger an orgasm; this is an atomic operation that sets ecstasy to 1.
node.TriggerSexOrgasm.name: Trigger Sex Orgasm
node.GetPosition.description: Pick a position from the coordinate registry, outputting the vector and its stage.
node.GetPosition.name: Get Position
node.GetRandomPosition.description: Return a random position in the current stage, optionally constrained by a minimum distance from the player.
node.GetRandomPosition.name: Get Random Position
node.GetSave.description: Read a value from persistent cross-session storage (_save.key).
node.GetSave.name: Get Save
node.GetSettings.description: Read a value from the settings menu defined in meta.json (_settings).
node.GetSettings.name: Get Settings
node.GetSkillShortcut.description: Return the action index currently bound to a shortcut slot.
node.GetSkillShortcut.name: Get Skill Shortcut
node.GetSnapshotData.description: Return metadata for a snapshot image, including scene state at the time it was taken.
node.GetSnapshotData.name: Get Snapshot Data
node.GetStageRankLimit.description: Return the current RP rank limit for a stage.
node.GetStageRankLimit.name: Get Stage Rank Limit
node.GetStamina.description: Return the player's current stamina value.
node.GetStamina.name: Get Stamina
node.GetStateBool.description: Read a boolean field from the read-only _state global state.
node.GetStateBool.name: Get State Boolean
node.GetStateNumber.description: Read a numeric field from the read-only _state global state.
node.GetStateNumber.name: Get State Number
node.GetTime.description: Read the accumulated in-game time in seconds, excluding paused time and respecting slow-motion effects.
node.GetTime.name: Get Time
node.GetTimeDiff.description: Read the frame-to-frame in-game time delta in seconds for frame-rate-independent updates.
node.GetTimeDiff.name: Get Time Diff
node.GetType.description: Return the runtime type name of a value, such as Number, String, Boolean, List, Object or null.
node.GetType.name: Get Type
node.Global.description: Read or write a global variable that is shared across all threads and labels.
node.Global.name: Global
node.Global.param.name: name
node.Goto.description: Jump execution in the current thread to the specified label. You can pass extra data to the target label as local variables.
node.Goto.name: Goto

node.Group.description: Create a titled visual grouping box on the canvas to organize nodes.
node.Group.name: Group
node.Group.param.title: title
node.If.description: Branch execution based on a boolean condition. The True branch runs when the condition is met, otherwise the False branch runs.
node.If.name: If
node.Length.description: Return the number of characters in a string.
node.Length.name: Length
node.Local.description: Read or write a local variable in the current thread or label scope.
node.Local.name: Local
node.Local.param.name: name
node.LockHandcuffs.description: Lock handcuffs on the player, choosing between normal, keyed, timed or other types and optional attachment.
node.LockHandcuffs.name: Lock Handcuffs
node.Log.description: Print a message to the game console for debugging or runtime logging.
node.Log.name: Log
node.Log10.description: Return the base-10 logarithm of a number; the input must be greater than 0.

node.LogicOr.name: Logic Or

node.MakeVector.name: Make Vector

node.Meta.param.title: title

node.PlaySoundEffect.param.name: name

node.Quaternion.name: Quaternion
node.Random.description: Generate a random floating-point number, optionally within a min–max range.
node.Random.name: Random

node.RandomInt.name: Random Int
node.Range.description: Generate a list of numbers starting from start, stepping by step, up to but not including stop.
node.Range.name: Range

node.Round.description: Round a number to the nearest integer.
node.Round.name: Round

node.SetAction.name: Set Action

node.SetCamera.name: Set Camera

node.SetCurrentRP.description: Set the player's total held RP to a specific value and return it.
node.SetCurrentRP.name: Set Current RP

node.SetEcstasy.name: Set Ecstasy

node.SetEvent.name: Set Event

node.SetFutanari.name: Set Futanari
node.SetGraphicsOption.description: Set a graphics option such as motion blur, brightness or bloom.
node.SetGraphicsOption.name: Set Graphics Option
node.SetItemCount.description: Set the count of a specific item directly and return the new count.
node.SetItemCount.name: Set Item Count
node.SetMoisture.description: Set the player's bladder/moisture value directly.
node.SetMoisture.name: Set Moisture
node.SetPiston.description: Control the motion strength of equipped piston toys.
node.SetPiston.name: Set Piston

node.SetPlayerData.name: Set Player Data

node.SetPlayerPosition.name: Set Player Position

node.SetPortalEnabled.name: Set Portal Enabled

node.SetSexMenu.name: Set Sex Menu

node.TriggerGameOver.name: Trigger Game Over

node.UnequipAllCosplay.name: Unequip All Cosplay
